307 GG0130B2_ORAL_GOAL_BY_END_CD GG0130B2_ORAL_GOAL_BY_END_CD GG0130B2 Discharge Goal Oral Hygiene Code - The data in this column indicates the patient's discharge goal for oral hygiene care. CHAR 2 The data in this column indicates the patient's discharge goal for oral hygiene care. 01 = Dependent
02 = Substantial/maximal assistance
03 = Partial/moderate
